creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lme
Date: Fri May 10 20:43:23 2013
New Revision: 317840
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317840

Log:
  - Update to 1.5
  - Trim Makefile header
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/178440
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/archivers/zipper/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/archivers/zipper/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/archivers/zipper/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/archivers/zipper/Makefile	Fri May 10 20:43:14 2013	(r317839)
+++ head/archivers/zipper/Makefile	Fri May 10 20:43:23 2013	(r317840)
@@ -1,18 +1,14 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    zipper.app
-# Date created:         31 Aug 2006
-# Whom:                 gurkan@phys.ethz.ch
-#
+# Created by: gurkan@phys.ethz.ch
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	zipper
-PORTVERSION=	1.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.5
 CATEGORIES=	archivers gnustep
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SAVANNAH}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	gap
 DISTNAME=	Zipper-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Tool for inspecting the contents of a compressed archive
 
 USE_GNUSTEP=	yes

==============================================================================
